name: template-vite-ts
description: A Phaser 3 TypeScript template using Vite.
author: Phaser Studio <support@phaser.io> (https://phaser.io/)

scripts.scan:secrets: sh -c 'if git grep -n -E "(API_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN|PASSWORD|PRIVATE_KEY|BEGIN RSA|BEGIN OPENSSH|ghp_|sk-)" -- . ":!package-lock.json" ":!package.json" ":!SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md"; then echo "Potential secrets detected"; exit 1; else echo "No secrets detected"; exit 0; fi'
